'''shahoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kadahi|kadahi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-h-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kadahi|kadahi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shahoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæheyeth|shæheyeth]] || [[word:shæheyej|shæheyej]] || [[word:shæheyesh|shæheyesh]] || [[word:shæheye|shæheye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shahohoyoth|shahohoyoth]] || [[word:shahohoyoj|shahohoyoj]] || [[word:shahohoyosh|shahohoyosh]] || [[word:shahohoyo|shahohoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shahoyoth|shahoyoth]] || [[word:shahoyoj|shahoyoj]] || [[word:shahoyosh|shahoyosh]] || [[word:shahoyo|shahoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shahofyoth|shahofyoth]] || [[word:shahofyoj|shahofyoj]] || [[word:shahofyosh|shahofyosh]] || [[word:shahofyof|shahofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shahoyotho|shahoyotho]] || [[word:shahoyojo|shahoyojo]] || [[word:shahoyosho|shahoyosho]] || [[word:shahoyoko|shahoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shahoyoth|shahoyoth]] || [[word:shahoyoj|shahoyoj]] || [[word:shahoyosh|shahoyosh]] || [[word:shahoyo|shahoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shahoyothol|shahoyothol]] || [[word:shahoyojol|shahoyojol]] || [[word:shahoyoshol|shahoyoshol]] || [[word:shahoyokol|shahoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shahoyothotho|shahoyothotho]] || [[word:shahoyojojo|shahoyojojo]] || [[word:shahoyoshosho|shahoyoshosho]] || [[word:shahoyoko|shahoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shahoyothon|shahoyothon]] || [[word:shahoyojon|shahoyojon]] || [[word:shahoyoshon|shahoyoshon]] || [[word:shahoyokon|shahoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shahoyothoro|shahoyothoro]] || [[word:shahoyojoro|shahoyojoro]] || [[word:shahoyoshoro|shahoyoshoro]] || [[word:shahoyokoro|shahoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
